arts.ttl: Huddersfield Town to sign Heracles left-back at the start of January
arts.sum: Heracles have announced that Ruben Roosken will join Huddersfield Town in January. The left-back had just a few months left on his contract that expired at the end of the…

arts.ttl: Preview: Huddersfield Town vs. Burton Albion - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's League One clash between Huddersfield Town and Burton Albion, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
